pkgmetadata.longdescription: ZhDate [[VersionBadge](httpsimg.shields.iopypivzhdate.svgstyleflat)](httpspypi.orgprojectzhdate) [[pythonversion](httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionszhdate.svgstyleflat-square)](httpspypi.orgprojectzhdate) [[LicenseBadge](httpsimg.shields.iogithublicenseCutePandaShzhdate.svgstyleflat)](httpsgithub.comCutePandaShzhdateblobmasterLICENSE) [EillesWan](httpsgithub.comEillesWanzhdate) - - f pip bashpip install zhdategitbashgit clone httpsgithub.comCutePandaShzhdate.gitcd zhdatepython setup.py installbashpip install zhdate --upgrade pythonfrom zhdate import ZhDatedate1 ZhDate(2010, 1, 1) 2010 print(date1) dt_date1 date1.to_datetime() datetime dt_date2 datetime(2010, 2, 6)date2 ZhDate.from_datetime(dt_date2) date3 ZhDate(2020, 4, 30, leap_monthTrue) 2020430print(date3.to_datetime()) if ZhDate(2019, 1, 1) ZhDate.from_datetime(datetime(2019, 2, 5)) pass new_zhdate ZhDate(2019, 1, 1) - 30 new_zhdate2 ZhDate(2019, 1, 1) - ZhDate(2018, 1, 1) zhdatenew_zhdate3 ZhDate(2019, 1, 1) - datetime(2019, 1, 1) new_zhdate4 ZhDate(2019, 1, 1) + 30 new_zhdate5 ZhDate(2019, 1, 1)print(new_zhdate5.chinese()) ZhDate.today()
